provider.name: RanobeDB Light Novels
provider.description: Metadata provider for light novels from RanobeDB

language_order.notes: Determines the order in which titles, authors, and series names are selected. Example: 'en,romaji,ja' means English first, then Romaji, then Japanese.

description_language.notes: Choose which language to use for book descriptions and comments.

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return
max_results.notes: Limits the number of results returned per search query. Higher values = more results but slower.

enhance_series.notes: Controls how much series information to fetch. 'basic' is recommended for balance between speed and completeness.

fallback_series_search.notes: If title search fails or returns no results, try searching by series name. Useful for finding all volumes in a series.

api.rate_limit_notes: 60 requests per minute (1 request per second)

server.notes: Configuration for running as HTTP server. Adjust workers for production use.

comprehensive.description: Full series metadata with English preference
